[[co:commons:Category:Sakuragaoka Kofun]][[ja:桜ヶ丘古墳]] [[co:commons:Category:Sakuragaoka Kofun]][[ja:桜ヶ丘古墳]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTcommons:Category:Sakuragaoka Kofun]][[ja:桜ヶ丘古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|image=File:桜ヶ丘古墳出土 金銅製天冠.JPG}} '''Sakuragaoka Kofun''' (桜ヶ丘古墳, also known as 桜ケ丘古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|WD=Q1141225|lt=Kofun|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Asama Onsen|en|Asama Onsen|WD=Q4803471|lt=Asama Onsen|1=Asama Onsen}}, {{ill|Matsumoto, Nagano|en|Matsumoto, Nagano|WD=Q213324|lt=Matsumoto|1=Matsumoto, Nagano}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|empun (circular tumulus)|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/empun (circular tumulus)|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. Although not designated as a historic site, its excavated artifacts are designated as {{ill|Nagano Prefecture Cultural Property|ja|長野県宝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagano Prefecture Cultural Property|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 長野県指定文化財一覧|1=Nagano Prefecture Cultural Property|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11654318}}. == Overview == This kofun is located at the tip of a ridge in the Sakuragaoka hills on the northeastern edge of the {{ill|Matsumoto Basin|ja|松本盆地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumoto Basin|1=Matsumoto Basin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11531206}}, at an elevation of approximately 678 meters. It was discovered in {{ill|1954|en|1954|WD=Q18581|lt=1954|1=1954}} by junior high school students and excavated in {{ill|1955|en|1955|WD=Q18577|lt=1955|1=1955}}, yielding numerous {{ill|Grave goods|en|Grave goods|WD=Q1399692|lt=grave goods|1=Grave goods}}. The tumulus is circular, measuring approximately 30 meters in diameter and about 5 meters in height{{sfn|Nagano Prefecture Matsumoto City Sakuragaoka Kofun Reorganization Report|2003}}. The burial facility, though poorly preserved, is a type of {{ill|vertical pit stone chamber|ja|竪穴式石室|1=Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=竪穴式石室|4=zh|5=豎穴式石室|1=Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/vertical pit stone chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}}, divided into a main chamber and a sub-chamber{{sfn|Nagano Prefecture Matsumoto City Sakuragaoka Kofun Reorganization Report|2003}}. The main chamber measures 2.5 meters in length and 1.2–1.3 meters in width, while the sub-chamber (stone cist) measures 1.8–1.85 meters in length and about 0.6 meters in width{{sfn|Nagano Prefecture Matsumoto City Sakuragaoka Kofun Reorganization Report|2003}}. Numerous grave goods, including a gilt-bronze {{ill|tenkan (crown)|ja|天冠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/tenkan (crown)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and a full set of {{ill|Japanese armour|en|Japanese armour|WD=Q3671179|lt=armor|1=Japanese armour}}, were discovered inside the stone chamber. The kofun is estimated to have been constructed in the latter half of the {{ill|5th century|en|5th century|WD=Q8095|lt=5th century|1=5th century}}, during the middle of the {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun period|1=Kofun period}}{{sfn|Nagano Prefecture Matsumoto City Sakuragaoka Kofun Reorganization Report|2003}}. It is unique because it contains both symbols of political authority (such as the tenkan and combs) and military power (such as weapons and armor). The artifacts were designated as Nagano Prefecture Cultural Property in {{ill|2010|en|2010|WD=Q1995|lt=2010|1=2010}}. == Site History == * {{ill|1954|en|1954|WD=Q18581|lt=1954|1=1954}}: Discovered by students from Metoba Junior High School. * {{ill|1955|en|1955|WD=Q18577|lt=1955|1=1955}}: Excavation conducted, yielding grave goods (reported in {{ill|1966|en|1966|WD=Q2649|lt=1966|1=1966}} by researchers including {{ill|Oba Iwao|ja|大場磐雄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oba Iwao|1=Iwao Ōba|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11433904}} of {{ill|Kokugakuin University|en|Kokugakuin University|WD=Q495330|lt=Kokugakuin University|1=Kokugakuin University}}). * {{ill|1969|en|1969|WD=Q2485|lt=1969|1=1969}}: The gilt-bronze tenkan designated as a Nagano Prefecture Cultural Property. * {{ill|1987|en|1987|WD=Q2429|lt=1987|1=1987}}: Mound measurement survey and re-measurement of some artifacts (reported in {{ill|1988|en|1988|WD=Q2426|lt=1988|1=1988}} by Makoto Takizawa and others). * {{ill|1988|en|1988|WD=Q2426|lt=1988|1=1988}} (March 17): Artifacts other than the gilt-bronze tenkan designated as Matsumoto City Important Cultural Property. * {{ill|2002|en|2002|WD=Q1987|lt=2002|1=2002}}: Reorganization of artifacts by the Matsumoto City Board of Education, with the report published in {{ill|2003|en|2003|WD=Q1986|lt=2003|1=2003}}{{sfn|Nagano Prefecture Matsumoto City Sakuragaoka Kofun Reorganization Report|2003}}. * {{ill|2010|en|2010|WD=Q1995|lt=2010|1=2010}} (October 18): Artifacts designated as Nagano Prefecture Cultural Property. == Artifacts == 桜ヶ丘古墳出土 金銅製天冠.JPG|Gilt-bronze Tenkan (Nagano Prefecture Cultural Property) 桜ヶ丘古墳出土 甲冑.JPG|Armor (Nagano Prefecture Cultural Property) 桜ヶ丘古墳出土 衝角付冑.JPG|Helmet with Horn-like Protrusion 桜ヶ丘古墳出土 短甲.JPG|Short Armor 桜ヶ丘古墳 出土品.JPG|Ornaments, Weapons, and Neck Armor == Cultural Property Designation == === Nagano Prefecture Cultural Property === * **Nagano Prefecture Cultural Property (Tangible Cultural Property)** ** Artifacts excavated from Sakuragaoka Kofun (archaeological materials) - Designated on October 18, 2010. == Related Facilities == * {{ill|Matsumoto City Museum of Archaeology|en|Matsumoto City Museum of Archaeology|WD=Q11531046|lt=Matsumoto City Archaeological Museum|1=Matsumoto City Museum of Archaeology}} (Nakayama, Matsumoto City) - Houses and displays artifacts from Sakuragaoka Kofun. == References == {{reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.matsumoto.nagano.jp/soshiki/134/3725.html Artifacts from Sakuragaoka Kofun] - Matsumoto City Official Website * [https://www.82bunka.or.jp/bunkazai/detail.php?no=2111 Artifacts from Sakuragaoka Kofun] - 82 Cultural Property Foundation Horned Kabuto 桜ヶ丘古墳出土 衝角付冑.JPG|Horned helmet from {{ill|Sakuragaoka Kofun|ja|桜ヶ丘古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakuragaoka Kofun|qq=}}
